title: myosotis scorpioides subsp. baltica
intro: Myosotis scorpioides subsp. baltica, also known as the Baltic forget-me-not, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the borage family (Boraginaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Baltic forget-me-not include relieving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as soothing digestive problems. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
